entity.label: Pedaiah
entity.subtitle: Male
entity.description: The father of Zebudah, who was the wife of Josiah and mother of king Jehoiakim (2 Kings 23:36).

nodes.label: Pedaiah
nodes.description: The father of Zebudah, who was the wife of Josiah and mother of king Jehoiakim (2 Kings 23:36).

nodes.label: Zebudah
nodes.description: Given, the wife of Josiah and mother of Jehoiakim (2 Kings 23:36).

verses.text: Jehoiakim was twenty and five years old when he began to reign; and he reigned eleven years in Jerusalem. And his mother’s name was Zebudah, the daughter of Pedaiah of Rumah.
